name: Jeb Bush
subject: Hillary said:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

This week Hillary Clinton said that people's deep-seated religious beliefs need to be changed in order to advance her own personal political agenda. Wow.

America was founded on religious freedom, and that freedom is woven into the Bill of Rights as the first guarantee. And strengthening families is an important element to helping people rise up.

**This shouldn 't be a partisan political issue, but unfortunately for Hillary Clinton it sounds like it is.**

If you agree that we should be protecting - not undermining - people with religious beliefs, add your name to stand with me today. [**RighttoRisePac.org/Protect-Religious-Freedom**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2352:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Jeb
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=251&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Ted is Leading!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the following address: http://act.tedcruz.org/index.php/email/emailWebview?mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonv6nPZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4ASsBnI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D

Hello Friend,

Whether it is on national security, on marriage, or on a whole host of issues important to courageous conservatives across our nation, Ted is leading the fight.

Just yesterday morning, Ted was in Las Vegas where he discussed <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/ted-cruz-brings-republican-jewish-coalition-to-their-feet-in-las-vegas/> his efforts to promote U.S. national security, our relationship with the nation of Israel, and efforts to stop a nuclear Iran with the Republican Jewish Coalition.

>From there, he flew to Waukee, Iowa, to join the Iowa Faith and Freedom Coalition to talk about his vision for protecting religious liberty and marriage, where again, he has been leading. On Thursday, Ted filed <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/steve-deace-cruz-amend-the-constitution-to-defend-marriage/> the Restoration of Marriage Amendment and the Protect Marriage from the Courts Act to guarantee the American people's right to define marriage as the union of one man and one woman. Ted got a great reaction to his remarks from the Iowans in the crowd -- click here to watch the video <https://www.tedcruz.org/ted-cruz-at-the-iowa-faith-and-freedom-summit/>.

On Tuesday, Ted joined Congressman Paul Ryan of Wisconsin to write an op-ed in the Wall Street Journal <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-sen-ted-cruz-and-rep-paul-ryan-putting-congress-in-charge-on-trade/> in support of establishing trade-promotion authority to strengthen the bargaining position of the United States in upcoming trade agreement negotiations. You can read the op-ed here <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-sen-ted-cruz-and-rep-paul-ryan-putting-congress-in-charge-on-trade/>.

And on Friday, Ted led once again. He was the first candidate for President to call on Hillary Clinton to return all donations made by foreign governments <https://www.tedcruz.org/landing/return_the_money/> to the Clinton Foundation. As Ted said, "the Clinton Foundation collected tens of millions of dollars from foreign governments including donors who had business interests with the State Department while Clinton was Secretary. She made decisions in that capacity that likely benefited the same people who were giving large donations to the foundation. At the very least, these revelations present a clear conflict of interest. I call on Hillary Clinton to return the donations from foreign governments. Until she does, how can the American people trust her with another position of power?"

As always, we thank you for your support, and for those of you in South Carolina, we hope you'll be able to join Ted at next weekend's State Convention!

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President
Press Clips

Cruz: Radicalized left assaulting religious liberty
Des Moines Register <http://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/news/elections/presidential/caucus/2015/04/25/cruz-radicalized-left-assaulting-religious-liberty/26395791/>

name: Marlon Marshall, Hillary for America
subject: Did you get one of these yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Get your sticker: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjI1NDU1NzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNzYyMDg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

Here's the deal: We want to send you one of the first official Hillary for America bumper stickers for free because you're one of the first people who stepped up and joined this campaign.

Sound good? I thought it might. **[Just let us know where to send it, and we'll put your sticker in the mail](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1NDU1NzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNzYyMDg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**. [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1NDU1NzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNzYyMDg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI1NDU1NzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNzYyMDg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/stickers](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjI1NDU1NzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNzYyMDg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
Talk to you soon,

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of State Campaigns and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

P.S. -- One more thing. If you know someone who might want to show their support with a free bumper sticker, go ahead and share this link. **[These stickers are pretty cool, after all](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjI1NDU1NzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNzYyMDg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**.
